name: ynab-clone
description: Self-hosted single-user envelope-budgeting app (YNAB clone). Modular monolith per ADR-001.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @ynab-clone/shared && npm run build -w @ynab-clone/server && npm run build -w @ynab-clone/web
scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @ynab-clone/server & npm run dev -w @ynab-clone/web & wait
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ynab-clone/shared && npm run test -w @ynab-clone/server && npm run test -w @ynab-clone/web
